sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32671" key="e)/kpleusis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔκπλευσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>,=<sense id="n32671.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἔκπλους, τῶν στόλων</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg022:117" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Par.Ptol.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">117</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
